---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an inaccuracy, typo, or broken link in the study notes
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug, documentation
---

## What is incorrect or broken?

A clear and concise description. Reference the **file path and line number** if possible (e.g., `objectives/domain-1/1.3-cloud-networking-concepts.md:142`).

## Why is it wrong?

Cite the official CompTIA CV0-004 objective, RFC, or cloud-provider docs that contradict the current content.

## Suggested correction

(Optional) Propose a fix or replacement sentence.

## Environment

- File:
- Section:
- Date observed:
